body_txt: Variant form of Naïve Newcomer . The young guy (often the Plucky Comic Relief ) who is still new to the whole place. He's often brilliant, almost always irreverent, and almost always "not ready for prime time" (i.e. throwing up the first time he sees a serious accident, etc). Commonly treated as a Butt-Monkey , especially if they're an unpaid intern, in which case whatever happens to them will be dismissed as "being paid in experience". Often, it's clear that The Intern was a former Teen Genius , but is now learning that life is much tougher in the field. Darker works will often have the employers treat the intern as a disposable Red Shirt ; this is a subtrope, Disposable Intern . See also New Meat , which is much the same trope but referring strictly to the military. For the Robert De Niro movie, go here .
